posts.community: Sequent Scientific - Indian story in Global Animal Pharma Space
posts.text: My Notes on Q4FY 26 Concall About Formerly known as Sequent Scientific. Company is into development of API, Finished Dose Formulation (FDF), Contract Research Service for animal healthcare. They also provide analytical services to Indian as well as global pharmaceutical companies. In CDMO, Viyash works with 8-10 big innovators in NCE molecules. Whereas in specialty CRAMs, Viyash is in entire value chain from conceptualization to manufacturing to filing for relevant approval from required authorities. In formulation company follows many model from which 50-50 partnership model is the most promi…
